subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your letter was received. Its meanings were suffused with spiritual sentiment, and its contents replete with mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء نامه شما رسید معانی احساس روحانی بود و مضمون مشحون باسرار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
